commands.review_summary:
The branch extends the opencode-go Kimi stream wrapper to strip reasoning fields from replayed `messages[]`, `input[]`, and nested content parts, with focused regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. The current-main source path preserves Kimi replay reasoning fields while the opencode-go wrapper strips only root params, matching the linked provider 400 error; I did not perform a live provider call.
